results.sql: SELECT mp.product_id, mp.article_number, mp.product_name, mp.manufacturer_name, ms.ugr, ms.cri, ms.ip_rating, ms.ik_rating, ms.min_temp_c, ms.max_temp_c, ms.electrical_power_w, ms.lumen_output_max, ms.color_temp_k_max, ms.runtime_hours, ms.controls_dali, mc.icon_tags FROM match_products mp JOIN match_specs ms ON mp.product_id = ms.product_id LEFT JOIN match_certs mc ON mp.product_id = mc.product_id WHERE (mp.is_current = 1) AND (mp.manufacturer_name = 'Regent Lighting') AND (mp.product_name = 'Board Essential') AND (mp.article_number = '2011.1813') AND (ms.electrical_power_w = 40) AND (ms.lumen_output_max >= 5600) AND (ms.ugr = 25) AND (ms.color_temp_k_max = 4000) AND (ms.cri >= 80) AND (ms.runtime_hours >= 50000) AND (ms.ip_rating >= 20) AND (ms.ik_rating >= 8) AND (ms.min_temp_c <= -10 AND ms.max_temp_c >= 35)
